_comment_user_name: REQUIRED. The name that appears after '## ' in the Team Charlie standup files for your section (e.g. 'Don', 'Nanda', 'Caroline'). Used to extract your accomplishments from the standup notes.
_comment_meeting_name: Optional. The text to look for in Monday's calendar subjects (case-insensitive). Defaults to 'How I AI'.
_comment_meeting_cadence_days: Optional. How many days between meetings, used as the fallback window when state.json hasn't recorded a previous meeting yet. Defaults to 14 (biweekly).
_comment_scratch_dir: Optional. Override the default scratch folder path. Defaults to 'C:\GitRepos\.scratch'.
_comment_ai_projects_dir: Optional. Where to keep your personal AI project list. Defaults to '%USERPROFILE%\Documents\AI Projects'.
_comment_prep_dir: Optional. Where prep docs are written. Defaults to '%USERPROFILE%\Downloads\How-I-AI'.
_comment_standup_dir: Optional. Where the Team Charlie standup files live. Defaults to the shared OneDrive path under your username. Override if you've synced to a different location.
standup_dir: %USERPROFILE%\OneDrive - Synopsys, Inc\Collaborative Services - oSL and MC - Team Charlie\Stand Ups
_comment_agent_transcripts_dir: Optional. Where Cursor stores agent transcripts for the Team Charlie workspace. The folder name encodes the workspace path; if Cursor opens the Team Charlie OneDrive folder, the default below should work. Otherwise check '%USERPROFILE%\.cursor\projects\' for the right folder.
_comment_env_file: Optional. Path to the .env file containing your Microsoft Graph credentials (CLIENT_ID, TENANT_ID, etc.) for the calendar auto-trigger. Defaults to '%USERPROFILE%\.env'. Only needed if you wire up the morning briefing hook.
